subcodes.first_line: The Book of God speaketh the truth, yet most among the people comprehend it not. Say: O people! Fear ye God, and follow not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق و الناس اکثرهم لایفقهون قل یا قوم خافوا الله و لاتتبعوا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for service, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Word of God is its own standard
